query:
SELECT a.animalId, a.acquisitionType, a.exitReason, a.exitDate, a.isActive, ac.name as category, sp.name as species
FROM animals a 
JOIN animal_categories ac ON a.categoryId = ac.id
JOIN species sp ON a.speciesId = sp.id
WHERE a.deletedAt IS NULL AND a.isActive = 0;
